subject: quick heads up on your session
snippet: Cordell Hall is not going to be ready. The electrical work overran... We have moved your keynote to Theatre B in the lower level north wing...
body_text:
Mary,

Sending this from home so please forgive the informality. I wanted you to hear this from me before the operations ticket lands in your inbox tomorrow morning.

Cordell Hall is not going to be ready. The electrical work overran and the facilities contractor is not willing to sign off on the room in time for the conference. We have moved your keynote to Theatre B in the lower level north wing. It is smaller, three hundred twenty seats rather than the four hundred and eighty in Cordell, but the acoustics are actually better for a spoken piece and the projection is sharper.

Two things I need you to know because they affect what you prepare.

First the pre panel that Aisha Rahman was going to moderate before your slot has been folded into your session. There will not be a separate introducer panel. You will take the stage at two in the afternoon and you will have the full hour that was previously split between the panel and your slot.

Second because you now have the full hour rather than the forty five minutes that were left after the panel intro, you have room to breathe in your talk.

The AV walkthrough is at twelve thirty. I have you on the schedule for that already, no action needed.

Rest well.

Reggie
